title: Lore Link

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/1179475877436858400?logo=discord&color=blue)](http://discord.gg/e2SE62WT6x) [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-CurseForge-orange?logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lore-link) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Download-Modrinth-green?logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/project/lore-link) [![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source_Code-GitHub-white?logo=github)](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink)

# Lore Link

**Lore Link** is a **library mod** used by Ultra Studios' mods.  
It doesn’t add anything to game — it provides an API that connects mods together.

***

### 🎮 For Users

Just make sure to have this mod installed when our other mods requires it.  
⬇️ Download it on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lore-link).  
⚠️ If you have errors, check out [Common Errors](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/docs/problems.md).

***

### 📦 For Modpack Creators

Some mods that use Lore Link support **community extensions**.  
**If more than one extension is installed for the same mod**, a conflict may occur.  
You will have to set the config.

For details, see [Config Guide](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/docs/config_guide.md#-duplicate-strategy).

***

### ⚙️ For Developers

Lore Link provides:

*   **Helper classes** and utilities
*   **Auto-configuration system** _(in the future, as now there is only one supported mod)_
*   **Extensions API** for some mods

👉 Check the [Developer Guide](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/README_DEV.md) for details.

***

### 📚 Mods currently using Lore Link

*   **Simple Hardcore Respawn**
    *   [CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-hardcore-respawn)
    *   [Extensions Guide](https://github.com/Bles-1/LoreLink/blob/master/docs/extensions.md#simple-hardcore-respawn)
